operational_fields.what: Preserve the source request as a versioned intake record.
operational_fields.when: When a verified user request enters the workflow.
operational_fields.why: Prevent later interpretation from replacing the original user intent.
operational_fields.input: The original user request and its provenance.
operational_fields.input_requirements: The source is readable, attributable and free of copied secrets.
operational_fields.expected_output: A versioned intake record with source hash.
operational_fields.success_criteria: The owner recognizes the request and the source hash resolves.
operational_fields.failure_criteria: The source is missing, altered or contains prohibited sensitive data.
operational_fields.failure_action: Return to request capture and repair provenance or sanitation.
operational_fields.evidence: Intake artifact, source hash and owner confirmation.
operational_fields.next_transition: Send the intake record to the capture readiness gate.

operational_fields.what: Validate the intake against the accepted concept and close the review.
operational_fields.when: After the capture block produces an accepted intake record.
operational_fields.why: Prove the request can proceed without losing concept traceability.
operational_fields.input: Accepted intake record and concept sections C01 and C02.
operational_fields.input_requirements: The intake hash is valid and the concept version is current.
operational_fields.expected_output: A reviewed result and explicit completion disposition.
operational_fields.success_criteria: The review gate accepts traceability and produces the final result.
operational_fields.failure_criteria: Traceability is missing or the intake contradicts the accepted concept.
operational_fields.failure_action: Return to the review step or upstream capture step named by the finding.
operational_fields.resources: Canonical operation graph and local review workspace.
operational_fields.evidence: Gate result, review comments and accepted disposition.
operational_fields.next_transition: Close the example workflow at the terminal node.
